variants: Luca Fiorentino resides in Walnut Haven, where he continues to thrive in his profession at Prism Flete Group. Originating from Thorncove Village, he pursued his higher education at the Topaz Fields Institute, which laid the foundation for his successful career. His dedication and contributions have been recognized through the prestigious Frostwillow Plaque, an honor that symbolizes his commitment to excellence.
